projects.title: LunaMC Minecraft Server

projects.description: LunaMC's Bed Wars minigame built from scratch.

projects.description: An OpenGL based (graphics only) engine, a side project to practice computer physics.

projects.description: Small yet clean C project, meant to become a usable engine in the future.

projects.title: Java 2FA Wrapper
projects.description: A simple wrapper library for Google's 2FA library.

projects.title: Discord-Minecraft Rank Syncing
projects.description: Plugin that maps a Discord role to a rank in-game and syncs it every time the player joins or leaves.

projects.description: A comprehensive framework for Spigot plugin development with advanced NMS integration and utilities.
